channel.title: Comments for page "The DevourerLand Diaries"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The DevourerLand Diaries"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is neat! Saw this on the Art Exchange Hub, looking like something I didn't recognize from last year, after peeking at this year's entries. I now vaguely remember reading this last year and quite liking it. Not sure why it's only at +4 — sure, I don't know the skip that is at play here, but it feels like the beginning to a Lovecraftian story about mall Santas; only one person sees that something is wrong, and either he's insane or everyone else is. I like it, I like it, I like it. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was my christmas present for Gaffsey, very very belatedly posted on the main site for posterity.

ok bye again.
